name: Adams, Bernard William
description: Adams is one of those modest, congenial fellows who makes friends everywhere. He is always ready to lend a helping hand and is a good fellow well liked by all who know him. This was shown when he was elected to the Student Council in his Junior year. Besides being a regular "fusser," "Bernie" is also one of our "guns." As an associate of the Physics department, "Bottom" has proven his ability. He often confers with "Doc" on matters of importance which come under his personal direction. His hobby is "Advanced Mathematics" under Dean, and working problems on "The Magnetic Center of the Parabola."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Adams is one of those modest, congenial fellows who makes friends everywhere. He is always ready to lend a helping hand and is a good fellow well liked by all who know him. This was shown when he was elected to the Student Council in his Junior year. Besides being a regular "fusser," "Bernie" is also one of our "guns." As an associate of the Physics department, "Bottom" has proven his ability. He often confers with "Doc" on matters of importance which come under his personal direction. His hobby is "Advanced Mathematics" under Dean, and working problems on "The Magnetic Center of the Parabola."

name: Allen, James John
description: "Jimmie" is one of those cheerful, sympathizing, hard working boys who is well liked by all students and people of Rolla, and possesses those rare qualities of character which make for success in the business world. His popularity was well illustrated when he was unanimously elected Cheer Leader. Jimmy has always been glad to serve on committees, among which are the Copeland Banquet, St. Louis Booster Banquet, and our Class Banquets. He first began his college career as office boy of the Rollamo, from which position he rose to Business Manager of the present Board. (To him was given the unappreciated task of removing the Rollamo from debt.)
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

(To him was given the unappreciated task of removing the Rollamo from debt.)

name: Ashdown, Byron Lee
description: Besides showing his ability as Editor of the Miner, "Cinders," is one of our "guns." One of the earliest bad habits he had was the taking of subjects under Elmo G. and Mac, but he has since been cured and is now doing nicely. As President of the Student Council, "Fuzzy" made this body one of real force. Outside of being a member of the Quo Vadis Club and a Christmas Gift, there is but one thing more to say about this character; he tells jokes and by some is declared to be the originator of keen wit.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Outside of being a member of the Quo Vadis Club and a Christmas Gift, there is but one thing more to say about this character; he tells jokes and by some is declared to be the originator of keen wit.

name: Bennett, Roy Linwood
description: "Mex" hails from Raton, "somewhere" in New Mexico. Although he has left us a few times, he somehow always has managed to find his way back. He is well liked by all for his ready wit and by some is called the Dean of Blank Verse.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mex" hails from Raton, "somewhere" in New Mexico. Although he has left us a few times, he somehow always has managed to find his way back. He is well liked by all for his ready wit and by some is called the Dean of Blank Verse.

name: Beyer, Emil L.
description: "Aim" is one of those fellows who, knowing what he wants, stays with it until it is accomplished. Although under the guidance of the Civils, he lent a helping hand to the Miners and joined the Missouri Mining Association. Father was right, it's all wrong when they said that no one around here has any pep, for they all overlook Aim. His perseverance may be the cause of the solution of the Geology Department's grading system some of these days. Who knows? No one else has ever solved it.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

His perseverance may be the cause of the solution of the Geology Department's grading system some of these days. Who knows? No one else has ever solved it.

name: Burg, Robert Stanley
description: "Bob" was not one of the original ninety-five, but came to us when we were sophomores. His perseverance and studious attitude have accomplished much. Besides being a member of the Mining and Athletic Associations, his name is listed under the Trowel Club, and even the Y. M. C. A. He has great ambitions of being a Prof. and likes to sit in Prof. Mann's chair. "How's that? What's the idea?"
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Cabel, Philander Lathrop
description: Cable came to us with laurels previously secured at "dear old Harvard." To many, his interest in mining subjects is a mystery. Is generally looked upon as the ideal student; studies as the mood prompts. Is a New York Encyclopedia on the celebrities, latest music, shows and histories of famous characters. Takes numerous trips to St. Louis.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Is generally looked upon as the ideal student; studies as the mood prompts. Is a New York Encyclopedia on the celebrities, latest music, shows and histories of famous characters. Takes numerous trips to St. Louis.

name: Casanovas, Juan R.
description: "Cas" hails from Baracoa, Cuba, and is referred to as the "Cuban Count." We see very little of "Cas" and don't know the cause; possibly his Senorita. He does not believe in war because when Doyle hurled a Beanery "bullet" at him, he withdrew his forces to a neutral position. "Cas" has the distinction of being the only Cuban in the Mining and Athletic Associations at the present time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

"Cas" has the distinction of being the only Cuban in the Mining and Athletic Associations at the present time.

name: Dean, Reginald Scott
description: The infant prodigy (being only eighteen years of age), stands forth from our midst as one of the "guns." He already has a part of the alphabet tacked on behind his name and is now looking forward to an M.S. in Chemistry and Geology this year. "Deanie" has written several articles (lack of space prevents titles) which have been published in various technical magazines, i.e., Police Gazette, etc., and is declared to be a second Lavoisier.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

"Deanie" has written several articles (lack of space prevents titles) which have been published in various technical magazines, i.e., Police Gazette, etc., and is declared to be a second Lavoisier.

name: Deutman, Earl George
description: Was the man who gave us the St. Patrick's benefit in our Junior year. He also started a movement to organize a Glee Club and would have succeeded, but for a bit of hard luck. His pep has done much for him. He is the kind of a fellow who does things. Although quite a fusser in Rolla, "Deut" doesn't seem to care for Springfield since his last visit. What's the reason?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

His pep has done much for him. He is the kind of a fellow who does things. Although quite a fusser in Rolla, "Deut" doesn't seem to care for Springfield since his last visit. What's the reason?

name: Dowd, James Joseph
motto: "Jimmie" is a good example of an impulsive strong willed Irishman. Always likes to discuss matters and never cares which side he takes just so the argument goes on to completion. He has made the Bonanza an actuality. Quite recently he raffled off the senior banner with unexpected results. A member of the Theta Tau and Assistant Business Manager of this year's Rollamo. Never stops kidding about what should be done.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Never stops kidding about what should be done.

name: Doyle, John Joseph
motto: "That's the stuff. Let's make it go" is the way "Jack" puts things and he usually makes good.
description: "Jack" was farmed out, in his tender years, at Washington University. His many good characteristics have given him the name of "Our Wild Irish Rose." "Jack" has joined or been connected with everything around school from Prof. Cox's geology class to the Schutzenfest. Greatest difficulties are attending Rollamo meetings and converting Hoo to woman's suffrage.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

"That's the stuff. Let's make it go" is the way "Jack" puts things and he usually makes good.

Greatest difficulties are attending Rollamo meetings and converting Hoo to woman's suffrage.

name: Dunham, Azman Thurman
high school: Rolla High School and Springfield Normal
description: He is at present a stray barb, having been a member of the Muckers and Bonanza. Although he started in as a High School Principal, he rapidly rose from the ranks and is now Assistant Manager of the Baltimore Hotel. His literary desires caused him to peddle books during the summer of his freshman year. Ever since then he has had a desire to return to his book field to see her. Has been married three years and thought he was getting away with it with the Senior Class. It's out though, now, Arbitritious. His splendid work as Marshal of St. Patrick's parade and how he "ameliorated" the Co-eds, will long be remembered.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Ehlers, Louis Wilmer
description: "Mike" hails from Baltimore, Maryland, and is strong for preparedness. (If you don't believe it, ask anyone who stayed here during the Christmas holidays.) Although he is quite a student, he devotes some of his time to the raising of his "Kaiser Wilhelm." He will try anything once, as is shown by the fact that he belongs to the Y. M. C. A., Athletic Association, and is President of the Missouri Mining Association. "Mike" is an optimist through and through, and converted Geib after the first semester finals.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

A., Athletic Association, and is President of the Missouri Mining Association. "Mike" is an optimist through and through, and converted Geib after the first semester finals.

name: Lucian, Erskine
description: "Leush" joined us in his sophomore year, having come from Washington University. He broke into the Headlines when he, as Florence Z. Wheatfield, wrote "Bridge's Cat-Astrophe," and has been there ever since. His latest is in the role of "Ragtime Paderewski," where he distinguishes himself. We don't know the by-laws of the Benedict's Club, but "Leush" has done more and talked less about it than any one else. At present he is Editor-in-Chief of the Rollamo. When in need of someone to do it, see him, for there is no telling what he can do until he is tried.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Charles, Berliand Gold
description: This is another St. Louis "article" and if he has not proved himself, we have not found it out. It was a disappointment to many of us not to see him a "Tau Beta Pi." We can sum up "Charlie" as follows—a good mixer, a brilliant student and a hard worker. His speech at the Sophomore banquet was a corker and will long be remembered. Was the man who managed the fitting and securing of the Senior caps and gowns on St. Patrick's Day.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Grotts, Fred
description: He is the best example of a politician and "Catalytic Agent" the School has ever had. Has never been known to fuss, but is supposed to have decided once for all. He has been the mainstay of the Baseball team and, as a pitcher, he has demonstrated his value.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Quo Vadis Theta Tau Grubstaker"
He is the best example of a politician and "Catalytic Agent" the School has ever had. Has never been known to fuss, but is supposed to have decided once for all. He has been the mainstay of the Baseball team and, as a pitcher, he has demonstrated his value.

name: Head, James Lawrence
description: He has been and is one of our most versatile men. Possesses originality and can always be depended on to say something in class meeting. Has been suspected of being in love, and has almost proved himself "not guilty." Has been a consistent hard worker for school interests, as is well shown by his various activities.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Theta Tau Sigma Nu"
He has been and is one of our most versatile men. Possesses originality and can always be depended on to say something in class meeting. Has been suspected of being in love, and has almost proved himself "not guilty." Has been a consistent hard worker for school interests, as is well shown by his various activities.

name: Heimberger, Harry Tobias
description: He is the slim man of '16. He is a native of Rolla and intends to follow Electrical Engineering. He is a persistent fusser and also a devotee to the art of singing bass. He is also well known for his bass violin playing and in the capacity of bass violinist has been on the job at every concert or entertainment. He is well liked by all of his classmates and professors.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He is also well known for his bass violin playing and in the capacity of bass violinist has been on the job at every concert or entertainment. He is well liked by all of his classmates and professors.

name: Heman, Frederick Richard
description: He is a good example of a typical wiry Dutchman. He always walks very fast and is supposed to think at the same rate, though his grades don't show the effect, being probably due to lack of application. He has been very active in athletics: football, track, and captain of the '16 Basketball Team. He is a pusher and when he gets behind anything you may be sure it will go through. He used to fuss. Nuff said!
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Hoffman, John Stone
description: "Jack" is one of those reliable fellows always to be depended upon to deliver the goods. Is not averse to conversation, but seldom expresses his opinion without being asked. Has never been known to "fuss," but we suspect it has not been due to lack of opportunity.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jack" is one of those reliable fellows always to be depended upon to deliver the goods. Is not averse to conversation, but seldom expresses his opinion without being asked. Has never been known to "fuss," but we suspect it has not been due to lack of opportunity.

name: Hoppock, Lewis N.
description: His connection with the Mining Association, Triangle Club, Student Council, Athletic Association, and Y. M. C. A. proves that the "N" stands for Napoleon. However, we feel sure that "Happy's" Waterloo is not in sight, for he is a conscientious worker and is always willing to help a good thing along. He says that Yaro makes a splendid girl.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: His connection with the Mining Association, Triangle Club, Student Council, Athletic Association, and Y. M. C. A. proves that the "N" stands for Napoleon. However, we feel sure that "Happy's" Waterloo is not in sight, for he is a conscientious worker and is always willing to help a good thing along. He says that Yaro makes a splendid girl.

name: Gunnard, Edmund Johnson
clubs: President, the Y. M. C. A.
description: "Johnny" made a hit with us right away and the first thing we knew, he was teaching chemistry to the "Green Ones," and has had that job ever since. However, he did not stop here for he became President of the Y. M. C. A., joined the Athletic and Mining Associations, the Pipe and Bowl Club, was made the Business Manager of the Miner and Treasurer of the Rollamo. With these duties, it is no wonder that his hair is becoming a minus quantity. He may be slow at times, but he always reaches the goal and can be depended upon to do his share in everything.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Earl, Ambrose Jones
description: "Jonah" didn't swallow the whale, but the whale came very nearly swallowing him. Is very fond of telling the latest (?) story, especially during class periods, though the listeners would rather accept their fate in the form of condensed lectures. Likes metallurgy and is always figuring out some novel method of zinc treatment.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Likes metallurgy and is always figuring out some novel method of zinc treatment.

name: Kamp, William Henry
description: Hails from St. Louis; an asset not to be overlooked when meeting him. Always has something to say about South St. Louis. Has always been interested in Athletics and we expect to see him take Coach Dennie's job some day. Made his "M" in baseball every year in school and was also captain in '16. Associate Editor of the Rollamo in '15.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from St. Louis; an asset not to be overlooked when meeting him. Always has something to say about South St. Louis. Has always been interested in Athletics and we expect to see him take Coach Dennie's job some day. Made his "M" in baseball every year in school and was also captain in '16. Associate Editor of the Rollamo in '15.

name: Klepel, Yaro
description: Yaro, another of our St. Louis boys, was inseparably associated with Weiberg as St. Pat's guards, in their freshmen, sophomore and junior years. As freshmen both were 50:50 on size and proportions, but now Yaro is hopelessly behind. Yaro is firm in his opinions, but seldom expresses them. Dislikes the term "Yarovitch." Although joining the Y. M. C. A. in his senior year, he has since become one of its most earnest workers. Recently joined a secret order, the N. S. N. Ask Yaro the meaning of these initials.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Kline, Harry Daniel
description: Harry is another Rolla boy and great is his pride therein. His very close association with John Schuman should at least have inspired a rival mustache. It has been rumored that an attempt along this line was inaugurated, but we have failed seeing it substantiated. Harry will always be remembered as the man who could give Professor Cox lessons in Geology. Joplin was also a field in which this coming engineer thrived. Has even admitted, himself, that he could pan a ten cent dirt.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Has even admitted, himself, that he could pan a ten cent dirt.

name: Koch, Hugo Edward
description: If "Shylock" was a good money collector, he had nothing on Hugo. Being class Treasurer is no small job at M. S. M. and we all, some to our sorrow and some to our embarrassment, have seen his ability in this line. As a student he is "there"; as a moralist, he can't be beat. It is rumored that immediately after graduation he will take an active part in the Temperance Union.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

M. and we all, some to our sorrow and some to our embarrassment, have seen his ability in this line. As a student he is "there"; as a moralist, he can't be beat. It is rumored that immediately after graduation he will take an active part in the Temperance Union.

name: Krebs, Joseph Jackson
description: "Jack" came to us from Louisiana, and with him came his languid air and southern charm which captivates the fair dames of Rolla. Many are the memories with which we will associate him; his nightly "recreation" strolls, his support of the snappy banquets, and last, but not least, his rank as a prohibitionist. Picture, will you, a tall dreamy personage, his body entirely concealed beneath a huge overcoat, a serene attitude of peace and content, and you have Jack Krebs.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jack" came to us from Louisiana, and with him came his languid air and southern charm which captivates the fair dames of Rolla. Many are the memories with which we will associate him; his nightly "recreation" strolls, his support of the snappy banquets, and last, but not least, his rank as a prohibitionist. Picture, will you, a tall dreamy personage, his body entirely concealed beneath a huge overcoat, a serene attitude of peace and content, and you have Jack Krebs.

name: Lawrence, Nathaniel Morris
description: Although signing up from the Big City, 100 miles east, it is fitting and proper that we mention his former hanging-out place. "Madam" is also from that center of refinement and culture, Boston. We poor students probably needed some enlightenment; at any rate the Bostonian influence has been asserting itself. We know of at least one accomplishment that Madam learned in Rolla—the making of a stove fire. Madam looks real cute below, doesn't he? His Apollo-like figure could not be taken properly by the staff photographer, but had to be taken by himself.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: McCartney, William Henry
description: The ideal of both sexes. He likes variety and is continually losing his heart. Fortunately, he awakes. His habits are excellent—believes in efficiency. We wonder if this is the reason he awakes just five minutes before class. Athletically inclined, as shown by his four years of football. Dotes on sleeping without pajamas on the front porch in early spring. "Mac" is another one of the practical miners. His experience at Garfield and Joplin confirms this. Has recently joined the School of Flotation, and is well on the way to becoming one of its experts. Helped make Rolla lively during Christmas.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Quo Vadis"
The ideal of both sexes. He likes variety and is continually losing his heart. Fortunately, he awakes. His habits are excellent—believes in efficiency. We wonder if this is the reason he awakes just five minutes before class. Athletically inclined, as shown by his four years of football. Dotes on sleeping without pajamas on the front porch in early spring. "Mac" is another one of the practical miners. His experience at Garfield and Joplin confirms this. Has recently joined the School of Flotation, and is well on the way to becoming one of its experts. Helped make Rolla lively during Christmas.

name: McNely, Earl Joseph
description: Belongs to that "species" of man who takes life more seriously than most of us. A man true to his convictions (and they are not few) and a man with the highest possible ideals. Besides being a thorough student he is an athlete and last, but not least, a fusser. In the latter he was as consistent as in everything else. We are safe in predicting that this same consistency will help him toward a future success.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Bonanza"
Belongs to that "species" of man who takes life more seriously than most of us. A man true to his convictions (and they are not few) and a man with the highest possible ideals. Besides being a thorough student he is an athlete and last, but not least, a fusser. In the latter he was as consistent as in everything else. We are safe in predicting that this same consistency will help him toward a future success.

name: Miller, Elton Arthur
description: "Kelly" came to us from the Illinois coal fields, big of heart and husky of body. When that memorable day came, "Green Cap Day," Kelly was unanimously elected the leader. Under his guidance we put up the hardest fight ever seen in the history of the school. Kelly's next step was to show us how to play football and his receiving four "M's" speaks well for his ability. We have in him the ideal combination—athlete, student and fusser. As a student he is consistent; as a fusser—"Well."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

We have in him the ideal combination—athlete, student and fusser. As a student he is consistent; as a fusser—"Well."

name: Miller, John Charles
description: "Charlie" is the hardest man in school to get any dope on, barring none. We know what he has done around school, a shark in class and a pusher and good mixer outside of class. He has never fussed, that is publicly or so we could see him, but that he must have is brought out by the fact that he quite suddenly stepped out one night and bowled his friends over by outstepping them at a dance. Where and how he learned this art is a mystery, but he certainly is its master. How about it Charlie?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Charlie" is the hardest man in school to get any dope on, barring none. We know what he has done around school, a shark in class and a pusher and good mixer outside of class. He has never fussed, that is publicly or so we could see him, but that he must have is brought out by the fact that he quite suddenly stepped out one night and bowled his friends over by outstepping them at a dance. Where and how he learned this art is a mystery, but he certainly is its master. How about it Charlie?

name: Morgan, Don Hawk
description: "Don" is another one who first spent a few years at Missouri University, but finally enlightenment reached him and our noble institution opened its doors to him. In the words of "Don," "I came to complete my education." We wish to congratulate the Y. M. C. A. on its acquisition of such a member, and we feel sure that his moral support has been felt. During "Don's" first year, he was a confirmed woman hater; now, what more need be said?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

During "Don's" first year, he was a confirmed woman hater; now, what more need be said?

name: Neustaedter, Harold Arthur
description: The Fountain of Effervescence! Joy and optimism personified! "Noisy" Neustaedter. Further introduction is useless. His home suggests much, New Jersey, the "Skeeter State." Marvelous are the deeds of the mosquito. The association has not been without results. "Noisy" has shown us how to do things and in the right way too. As to fussing, he is a neutral. As to ability, he is there. The Mining Profession is to be congratulated on having secured so able a recruit.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

As to ability, he is there. The Mining Profession is to be congratulated on having secured so able a recruit.

name: Peterson, Clarence Eugene
description: "Metallurgy Pete", "The Sweet", is one of the sharks in this institution. Before entering M. S. M., "Pete" helped the General Electric Company to run their affairs. Not only is he a scientific person, but a practical one as well. His Joplin experience will always be remembered. "Pete" has a number of proteges. Ask his friends about one called "Pete" and the one called "Mike." The man who knows all about one hundred per cent efficiency.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Pierce, Colwell Arba
description: "Collie" comes to us as a welcome addition from the Class of 1910. If they were all of his caliber it must have been a "humdinger" of a class. Though a "Benedict," he has demonstrated at several of our Senior Class Meetings, that the true spirit of M. S. M. increases with years. Was a member of the Rollamo board that put out the 1909 Year Book.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Was a member of the Rollamo board that put out the 1909 Year Book.

name: Sailer, Edward Louis
description: Is a born and bred Civil Engineer, and has maintained a "Tau Beta" standing all through his four years. Seldom fusses, and has only one bad habit which is chewing tobacco when he thinks no one is looking.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is a born and bred Civil Engineer, and has maintained a "Tau Beta" standing all through his four years. Seldom fusses, and has only one bad habit which is chewing tobacco when he thinks no one is looking.

name: Schuman, John
description: Has always admitted he was next to the best in the class, and admitting it, he has never been called upon to prove it. Chief diversion is in raising gigantic red mustaches, looking after the farm and driving around in "Schuman's Limousine." We are also told that he has a fondness for girls sitting in his lap, but he will never admit it.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Chief diversion is in raising gigantic red mustaches, looking after the farm and driving around in "Schuman's Limousine." We are also told that he has a fondness for girls sitting in his lap, but he will never admit it.

name: Smith, Virgil X.
description: Zing! A flash of khaki, a cloud of dust! What was it? "X" Smith on his motorcycle, riding over to see his girl in Salem. Says she is a "humdinger" and we believe it. His two main pastimes are Frame Structures and Dake's Geology work. Plays the mandolin, trombone, drum, piano and others too numerous to mention. Has the record of never having missed seeing No. 9 pass through, and always watches the Pullman windows for fair travelers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Stifel, Carl Godfried
clubs: Pipe and Bowl, Missouri Mining and Athletic Associations
description: "Carl is the modest one who keeps the ladies guessing. Flotation is his hobby, and he threatens to make some important discoveries that will make us all sit up and take notice. Came to us from Washington University in his sophomore year, and says he likes Rolla much better. Name is listed under Pipe and Bowl, Missouri Mining and Athletic Associations, and A. I. M. E., and has also served his time on the Student Council and Rollamo Board.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

E., and has also served his time on the Student Council and Rollamo Board.

name: Turnbull, Louis A.
description: Turnbull, the Senior partner of the firm of Allen and Turnbull, is agent for slide rules, technical magazines, Fords, insurance and the Cosmopolitan, so beware! Also keeps the Miner well filled with advertisements, and acts (when the mood seizes him) as private secretary and stenographer to Business Manager Allen of the Rollamo. Is a quiet demure lad who fusses occasionally.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Quo Vadis"
Turnbull, the Senior partner of the firm of Allen and Turnbull, is agent for slide rules, technical magazines, Fords, insurance and the Cosmopolitan, so beware! Also keeps the Miner well filled with advertisements, and acts (when the mood seizes him) as private secretary and stenographer to Business Manager Allen of the Rollamo. Is a quiet demure lad who fusses occasionally.

name: Ude, George Edgar
description: Ude is the other half of the Vogel-Ude combination, and is continually on the lookout for some sucker that he can inveigle into a poker game with Vogel and himself. Needless to say, the deck is always stacked, and the wireless system between the two sharks has Marconi backed off the boards. Will play pinochle, poker, seven-up, pitch or anything and is a second Hoyle when it comes to rules. Spends his summers in St. Louis in the drug business, (is a registered druggist). Eats on one side of town and rooms on the other.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Eats on one side of town and rooms on the other.

name: Vogel, Herman
description: Herman is the Thespian of the class, having played in "The Toastmaster" and the St. Pat's play of his Junior year. Would rather take part in a musical comedy than play poker, and he is very fond of the latter. Is a first-class quarterback and is a "sticker." Occasionally fusses, but likes playing pinochle better. Hails from the south side of a nearby brewery town. Is a Mining Engineer before graduating, having served the practical side of it for some time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Hails from the south side of a nearby brewery town. Is a Mining Engineer before graduating, having served the practical side of it for some time.

name: Weiberg, Earl Burdette
description: Comes to us from Springfield, Ill., Lincoln's home town, and we firmly believe he will follow in that great man's footsteps. His favorite song is "Sunbeam," which he picked up at a Holy Roller meeting. Occasionally keeps awake in class, but rather than appear bored at some of the lectures, he settles back in his chair and enjoys a quiet nap. Always comes up strong on finals, however. Makes trips to St. Louis, but refuses to tell her name.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Weissbach, Walter William
description: He is a quiet fellow with a real mustache and a pleasant smile. Has been known to have had as much as seven thousand dollars all in twenty dollar gold pieces, but the details are of the vaguest.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is a quiet fellow with a real mustache and a pleasant smile. Has been known to have had as much as seven thousand dollars all in twenty dollar gold pieces, but the details are of the vaguest.

name: Worley, James Alexander, Jr.
description: He hails from the Lone Star State, coming to us in his sophomore year from the University of Texas. He saw his first snow in Rolla and wants to see no more. He was born and raised in the grand old town of "San Antone." Occasionally drives out when Pitts is out of town. He is a born Geologist and was the gun of the Economic class. He is the last of the famous squirrel team of "Dex and Tex."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
